name: FullPage Studio
description: Full-page screenshot capture with a pro editing Studio, API-free AI-readable math, offline math OCR, and PDF support.

content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts allow-same-origin; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; worker-src 'self' blob: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; connect-src 'self' data: blob: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://huggingface.co https://*.hf.co https://cdn-lfs.huggingface.co https://cdn-lfs-us-1.huggingface.co; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'unsafe-inline';
